titleStmt.title: SII 24.148: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 148. (A.R. No. 17 of 1936-37.) IV PRĀKĀRA, WEST WALL.

summary.p: The inscription dated in the 35th year of the king seems to be incomplete. Records that certain lands were purchased and given as tirunāmattukkāṇi for worship and offerings to god Aḻagiyamaṇavāḷa-Perumāḷ by Ambalavaṉ-Kōyilāḻvār, a lady who was under the support (mudugaṇ) of Ambalavaṉ Periya-Perumāṉ alias Jagadēkavīra-Āchārya of Rājarājapuram. The details of the date viz., Tulā, śu. 13, Wednesday, Rēvati, correspond to A.D. 1212, October 10, Wednesday, ·25; f.d.n. ·10.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . puyal vāyttu maṇvaḷarap poyyāta nānmaṟaiyiṉ ceyal vāyppat tirumakaḷuñ jayamakaḷuñ ciṟantu vāḻa veṇmatipola kuṭai viḷaṅka velventaraṭi vaṇaṅka maṇmaṭantai maṉaṅkaḷippa maṉuniti taḻaittoṅkac cakkaramuñ ceṅkolun tikkaṉaittuñ cela naṭātti kaṟpakālattavatarittut tecamellām teṉ ticaiyil poṉa taṇṭu cetuviṉpāṟ celaviṭṭut teṉṉavanait tiṟai koṇṭu tiruvaṭikkiḻaṭaivittu vaṭaticaiyil poṉa taṇṭu mahāmeruvaip piṟakiṭṭuk kaṭaleḻum pukaḻ parappip paranta kaliyait turantaruḷit tiruviḷaṅkap pukaḻ viḷaṅkat tiyākavirak koṭi yeṭuttu vākai virakkaḻal kaṭṭit tikkeṭṭum Eval keṭ(p)pac cakkaraveṟpiṟ pukaḻeṟippac cempoṉ virasiṅhā saṉattup puvaṉamuḻutuṭaiyāroṭum
viṟṟiruntaruḷiya kopparakecaripanmarāṉa tiripuvaṉaccakkaravarttikaḷ maturaiyum Īḻamum karuvūrum pāṇṭiyaṉ muṭittalaiyuṅ koṇṭu vīr[ Ābhiṣekamum vija] y(ā) Abhiṣekamum paṇṇiyaruḷiṉa tiripuvaṉavīratevaṟku yāṇṭu 3 10 5— vatu tulā nāyaṟṟu pūrva[ pakṣattu] trayodaśiyum putankiḻamaiyum peṟṟa revati nāḷ Irā[ja*]rā[ja*]purattu Ampalavaṉ periya perumāṉāna jagadekavira Ācāriyaṉai mutukaṇṇāka Uṭaiya Antappurattu Eḻuntaruḷi Irukkum Ampalavan koyilāḻvār Aḻakiyamaṇavāḷap perumāḷukkut tirunāmattukkāṇiyākap palar pakkalum vilaikoṇṭu viṭṭa nilamāvatu . pāṇṭi kulācaṉivaḷanāṭṭu viḷā nāṭṭu brahmadeyam śrī Uttamacilic caturvetimaṅkalattu marutūr śrī kṛṣṇan karuṇākara Aggicit(ta)vājapeyayājiyār pakkal Ivvū
ruṭkuṟai jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻavatikku meṟku Uttamacili vāykkālukku vaṭakku Eḻāṅkaṇṇāṟṟu mutaṟ catirattu nilam nālumā Itil teṟkaṭaiya nilam Ira ṭayakkācu nālāyirattaññūṟ koṇṭa nila mukkāṇi Āka Innilat ṭali Ivvūr śrī prāntakac cerik tirunaṭṭapperumāḷāṉa cuntiracoḻapaṭṭaṉu(m) mivan tampi maṉattuḷāṉ paṭṭaṉum pakkal vilaikoṇṭa Ivvūruṭkuṟai cantira cekaravatikku meṟku Uttamacilivāykkālukku vaṭakku nālāṅkaṇṇāṟṟu muṉṟāñ catirattu Ivarkaḷ pitākkaḷ kulottuṅkacoḻapperuvilai koṇṭuṭaiyarāy yivarkaḷutāyirunta kollaṉ ceyyeṉṟu per kūvappaṭṭa nilat tukkup perunāṉkellai kiḻpāṟkellai Ātaṉūr tampittuṇaiyaṉ nilattukku meṟkum teṉpāṟkellai tiruvātavūṟ kūttāṭi paṭṭan
Uḷḷiṭṭa ku vaṭakkum mipāṟkellai Akaramum muṭicoḻac caturvetimaṅkalattu naṭuviliṟt toṭṭatti niṉṟum Āṟṟukkup pokiṟa peruvaḻikku vaṭakiḻakkum vaṭapāṟ kellai Ātaṉūruttamanampi nilattukkut teṟkum Inta perunāṉkellaikkuṭpaṭṭa kācu muvāyirattu Irunūṟṟampatukkuk koṇṭa nilam Araimāvum It ṭaiya yanila muntirikaiyum kuṟaivuḷḷaṭaṅka Innilam Araimāmuntirikai yum Ivvūruttamacittacceri tirunallūr Uloccaṉ śrī rāman śrī garuṭavāhana paṭṭaṉ pakkal vilai lukku vaṭakku Iraṇṭāṅkaṇṇāṟṟu Iraṇṭāñcatirattu ppiriyan pakkal vilaiyālun tāṉattālum peṟṟuṭaiyaṉāy Ivaṉutāyirunta nilamukkāṇik kiḻirumāvaraikku Icainta kiḻ
pāṟ kellai ṟṟukkuṭi sūriyatevaṉ tiruveṇkāṭu paṭṭaṉilat tukku kkum teṉpāṟkkellai viṟkkiṉṟāṉa puncey nilattukku vaṭakku mipāṟkellai meṟpaṭiyūr ṉilattukkuk kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai ti �yappar rumāṉ tiruvi kkut teṟkum Āka Icainta perunāṉkellaikkuḷ naṭuvupaṭṭa nilattil ka 184 10kkum vilaikoṇṭa rūpāy māviṉ nya 4yum Ivvūr śrī pirāntakacceri Iṭai maṅkalattu tiruvaraṅkamuṭaiyāṉ mahāteva paṭṭaṉ pakkal vilaikoṇṭa Ivvūr Uṭkuṟai puvaṉicūḷāmaṇivatikku meṟku Ik kku 5 kūThe symbol stands for ‘kaṇṇāṟṟu’ 2 catirattu ṉṟu per kūvappaṭṭa vaṭakkaṭaiya rūpāy 100 ḻra kiḻakku (1/2) caṉ Itaṉ teṉ ṉap puṉcey teṟkaṭaiya vāykkālukku nikki nikki nilam mma m Āka nilam 6 ma kiḻakku (1/2) ciṉṉattukku Icaiṉta peruṉāṉkellai kiḻpāṟkellai va
lavūrcaṉ ṉ mahāteva paṭṭaṉ nilattukku meṟkkum teṉpāṟk kellai paḻampālaivāykkālukku vaṭakkum mipāṟkellai vaṭakku nokki va ttukku vaṭakkum kellai kāverikkulaikku ka Icainta Iṉṉāṉ kellai Uḷ na Innilamikutikkuṟai vuḷḷaṭaṅka nilaṅkalanta vāṟṟāl nilam 1 ma Iṟāciṉ Ivaṉ perpaṭ ttil Eṉnutāyirunta ce cu[1000]kku vilaikoṇṭa viḷainilamum punceyyum nila Araimā Araikkāṇi � va ciṉṉamum Itaṉ kottam Āṟumā Āṟi muḷ vūrril śrī caṟṟumaṅkalattu tiruvirāmicuramuṭaiyāṉ paṭṭaṉ brāmmaṇi Iva ṉtaṉ dakṣiṇāmurtti tiruvirāmiśvaramuṭaiyāṉ paṭṭaṉai mutukaṇṇākak koṇṭu viṟkka Ivaṉ pakkal vilaikoṇṭa Ivvūruṭk kuṟai puvaṉicūḷāmaṇi vatikku meṟku ko
vin=tavāykkālukku vaṭakku kameṉṟu per kūvappaṭṭa nilattu vaṭakkaṭaiya nilam ‡10 ṭata ka ciṉṉamum Itan teṉ talaimaṉai puṉcey nilattukku teṟkaṭaiya vāykkālukku ciṉṉattukku Icainta kiḻpāṟkellai valavūrcaṉ ṉaṉ mahādeva paṭṭa � meṟkku teṉppā maṇavāḷap perumāḷ tiruviṭai yāṭṭattukku vaṭakku �kku teṟkkum Āka Icaiṉta peruṉān kellai tu Ivaḷ mātāpitākkaḷ Abhāvattu Ivaḷ taṅkai Āḷuṭaiyā pāti nilaṅkalantavāṟu cempāti nikki Ivaḷ nila Araimā Āṟum Āṟiṭupaṭukaiyum pperiya tiru Ivarkaḷ pakkal Irājagampiravaḷanāṭṭu viḷattūr nāṭṭut taṉi kāṇiyāna nilam tu vilai koṇṭu viṭṭa Iṭa
Āḷi Ā yāṉa tiruvaraṅka m kalveṭṭup paṭiyā mmutāy varukiṟa nilattu Eṉnu ki viṟṟa vikkirama coḻaviḷākameṉṟu per kūvappa ta kiḻpāṟkellai kkālukku meṟkkum teṉpāṟkellai kiḻakku ṉokki kiṟa Uṭciṟu vāykkāluk viḷākattu ka Icaiṉta peru nāṉkellaiyuḷ naṭuvu paṭṭa nilam mukkālil meṟkaṭaiyak kācu ḷa ṟṟa kārmaṟu rūpāy (1/4) Iṉṉilam kālum ṅka vaḷḷalārāṉa vikkirama coḻappirammārāyar pakkal kā 10 kku vilaikoṇṭa teṟkil tirukkaḻakaṇṭaṉeṉṟu per kūvappaṭṭa nilattukku Icaiṉta kiḻpāṟkellai ttaraiya viḷākattu maṇṇilaikku meṟkum
teṉpāṟkellai Ālaṅkuṭi Ellaikku va mipāṟkellai yūrkku nir pāykiṟa vāykkālukkuk kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai tiruvaraṅkap peruvaḻikku tteṟkum raiya viḷākattu Uṭciṟu vāykkālukkut teṟkum Āka vicainta perunāṉkellaiyuḷ naṭuvupaṭṭa nilattukku koṇṭuṭaiye ḷainilam O mpi taṅkaḷukku kiḻ māyk kila ṭiyarakt taṉṉutāy varukiṟa nilameṉṟu peci viṟṟatu m viḷākameṉṟu per kūvappaṭṭa nilam lai vaṭakkil tirukkaḻakaṇṭaṉukku meṟkum teṉpāṟkellai teṉṉavaṉ viḷākattukku vaṭakkum mipāṟkellai ne kkuk kiḻakkum vaṭapā viḷākattukkut teṟkum Āka Icaiṉta perunāṉ
Uḷ naṭuvupaṭṭa maṇali k kācu 3 1000 5 100 kku koṇṭa rūpāy n=ta Iṉṉilam mukkālum cci caṭakopanampiyum Ivaṉaiye mutukaṇṇāka Uṭaiya kantāṭai maturai nampi brāmmaṇi tirukkurukūr cāṉiyum tāṭait tevabrāmmaṇi Āḷavantāḷ cāṉiyum Im taṅkaḷukku Upaiyaci ykkalveṭṭuppaṭi taṅkaḷutāy varukiṟa nila kkā ta kku centāmaraikkaṇṇaviḷāka meṉṟu per kūvappaṭṭa Innilattukkum puṉceykkum Icainta kiḻpāṟkellai periya perumāḷ viḷākattukku meṟkum teṉpāṟkellai kku ppaṟṟukku vaṭakkum meṟpāṟkellai meṟppaṭa tuk kum [ kāśyapaṉ] Aḻakiyamaṇavāḷapperumāḷ nilattukkum kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟ kellai kellai
kku Uṭpaṭṭa puṉcey Uṭpaṭṭa rūpāy n=ta Iṉṉilam mukkālum meṟpaṭi nilattukkuk kiḻpāṟkellai tirunāmattukkāṇi tirumaṅkai vāykkālukku meṟkkum teṉ pāṟkellai periya perumāḷ viṣṇumurtti viḷākattukku vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai tirunāmattukkāṇi tāmaraip pūviḷākattukkuk kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai kāverik karaikkut teṟkkum Āka Icaiṉta perunāṉkellaikku Uṭpaṭṭa puṉcey Uṭpaṭṭa � va Iṉṉilam kālum Ākap puṉcey cey Uṭppaṭa � 1- li Iṉṉi lam Oruveliyum Āka Innilaṅkaḷ kaikkoṇṭu ṟkāka Uṭaiyā perumāḷaip kalamāṉa coḻaccaturvetimaṅkalattu śrī vayiṣṇavarkaḷil kuravaceri Uṭaiyār tiruveḻuntūr nampiyu māṟane naṉ centāmarai caturvetimaṅkalattu svāmi
bhaṭṭaṉ rāmāṉujadāsarum Immuvarum koḷvitta pramāṇappaṭiyāy kalveṭṭiṉa Innilaṅkaḷum tirunāmattukkāṇiyāki cantirātittavarai cella kaṭavatāka ṭṭaṭuma lattu śrī vayiṣṇavarkaḷ rakṣai . naṉṟāka raikkuṭiyil vilaikoṇṭa centāmaraik kaṇṇaviḷākattu kuṟai nālu māc ciṉṉattukkum naṉ viṉ ṟai nnilan kālukkum pratikṣetramāka nilainiṉṟa Ivvūṟ tirukkāṇippaṟṟil tirunāmattukkāṇi rūpāy ta kku nilattukku vaṭakkum vāykkālukku kiḻa kuṭaiyāḷ viḷākameṉṟu per kūvappaṭṭa vilai rūpāy 1000 Innila mukkāluṅ kai koṇṭu tirunāmattukkāṇiThe continuation is lost.
Digital edition of SII 24.148 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
